classes.name: sds-alt
classes.description: Alt — playback modifier.

classes.name: sds-arc-orbit
classes.description: Each child orbits in with stagger delay

classes.name: sds-aurora-text
classes.description: Six-colour gradient clip sweeps through text

classes.name: sds-blur-focus
classes.description: Sharpens from heavy blur with tracking

classes.name: sds-bounce-drop-in
classes.description: Drops in with a squashy bounce

classes.name: sds-bounce-in-up
classes.description: Multi-step elastic Y-axis bounce entrance

classes.name: sds-bounce-loop
classes.description: Bounces continuously (loop)

classes.name: sds-btn-amp
classes.description: Amp — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-aurora
classes.description: Aurora — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-beacon
classes.description: One ring ping every couple of seconds with true rest between — rhythm, not noise

classes.name: sds-btn-blinds
classes.description: A slatted cover wipes away in four steps, revealing the button like opening blinds

classes.name: sds-btn-border-flow
classes.description: Border Flow — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-bounce
classes.description: Bounce — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-breath-hold
classes.description: Inhale, hold at the top, quick exhale — asymmetric breathing that draws the eye

classes.name: sds-btn-burst
classes.description: Burst — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-charge
classes.description: Charge — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-crystal
classes.description: Crystal — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-depth-press
classes.description: Depth Press — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-dissolve
classes.description: Dissolve — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-draw-corners
classes.description: Four corner brackets pop in from outside and snap onto the corners with spring

classes.name: sds-btn-draw-cross
classes.description: Two diagonal light lines sweep across in opposite directions, crossing mid-button

classes.name: sds-btn-draw-dash
classes.description: A dashed frame appears segment-by-segment, dims, then solidifies bright before resetting

classes.name: sds-btn-draw-perimeter
classes.description: Border draws itself around the button, clicks at full frame, then fades for the next pass

classes.name: sds-btn-draw-pulse-frame
classes.description: Frame draws once, then breathes outward with fading echoes

classes.name: sds-btn-draw-underline-orbit
classes.description: Underline draws under the label, then swings a full orbit and parks back home

classes.name: sds-btn-edge
classes.description: Border traces the perimeter sequentially

classes.name: sds-btn-ember
classes.description: Heat shimmer: micro-skew, warm hue drift, and an ember glow that brightens on the exhale

classes.name: sds-btn-energy
classes.description: Double box-shadow ripple propagates out

classes.name: sds-btn-fill-corner
classes.description: Tint unfolds diagonally from the top-left corner with a −0.5° settle

classes.name: sds-btn-fill-drain
classes.description: Fill drains to the floor, pauses empty, then refills — a patient three-act loop

classes.name: sds-btn-fill-iris
classes.description: Tint blooms from the center as an iris while the button breathes 0.985→1 on a spring

classes.name: sds-btn-fill-rise
classes.description: Liquid sheet rises from the floor with a wobbling top edge, levels off, then ebbs away

classes.name: sds-btn-fill-split
classes.description: Two half-fills race from opposite edges and seal mid-button with a decaying flare

classes.name: sds-btn-fill-sweep
classes.description: Skewed tint sweeps across with a brightness kiss, holds, then exits with momentum

classes.name: sds-btn-fill-wave
classes.description: A tilted wave climbs in and levels flat while the label bobs once above it

classes.name: sds-btn-fire
classes.description: Fire — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-flare
classes.description: Flare — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-float
classes.description: Float — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-flux
classes.description: Flux — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-glow-core
classes.description: Glow Core — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-glow-surge
classes.description: Subtle outer glow that breathes

classes.name: sds-btn-gradient-shift
classes.description: Gradient Shift — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-gravity
classes.description: Gravity — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-gravity-pull
classes.description: Gravity Pull — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-guillotine
classes.description: The top half drops onto the emerging bottom half with a landing squash

classes.name: sds-btn-halo-breathe
classes.description: A soft halo grows and recedes with brightness in sync — calm, steady presence

classes.name: sds-btn-halo-flicker-on
classes.description: Powers on through three stepped flickers, then the halo blooms and holds

classes.name: sds-btn-halo-split
classes.description: The glow splits into two lobes that drift apart, dissolve, and re-merge each cycle

classes.name: sds-btn-heartbeat
classes.description: Heartbeat — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-hologram
classes.description: Hologram — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-ice
classes.description: Ice — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-icon-launch
classes.description: The icon winds up, rockets forward with motion blur, and glides back as the label leans after it

classes.name: sds-btn-icon-spin-settle
classes.description: The icon overshoots a full spin (380°→360°) while the label squeezes in sympathy

classes.name: sds-btn-kinetic
classes.description: Kinetic — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-label-slide
classes.description: The label slides up and out, then returns from below with a soft overshoot — a quiet refresh tick

classes.name: sds-btn-label-typewrite
classes.description: Label pieces type in on a stepped cascade, hold, then clear for the next pass

classes.name: sds-btn-label-wave
classes.description: Label pieces ripple a 2px wave left to right with tiny rotations

classes.name: sds-btn-lift
classes.description: Lifts with a growing depth shadow

classes.name: sds-btn-liquid
classes.description: Background fills from right to left

classes.name: sds-btn-magnetic
classes.description: Outward pulse ring on a loop

classes.name: sds-btn-magnetic-trail
classes.description: Magnetic Trail — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-momentum
classes.description: Momentum — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-morph
classes.description: Border-radius morphs between rect/pill

classes.name: sds-btn-neon
classes.description: Neon box-shadow with a flicker glitch

classes.name: sds-btn-neon-trace
classes.description: Neon Trace — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-night-sweep
classes.description: A dark veil wipes off to reveal the lit button, rests, then falls again

classes.name: sds-btn-nudge
classes.description: The trailing chevron nudges forward twice with decaying amplitude — the go-on gesture

classes.name: sds-btn-outline-grow
classes.description: Outline Grow — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-plasma
classes.description: Plasma-like glow shifts through colours

classes.name: sds-btn-press
classes.description: Presses down as if physically clicked

classes.name: sds-btn-press-coin
classes.description: Tips 12° like a pressed coin edge while its shaded side deepens, then rights itself

classes.name: sds-btn-press-drop
classes.description: Falls in from above, lands with a squash and a single dust ring

classes.name: sds-btn-press-elastic
classes.description: Horizontal tug stretches it wide then tall, snapping back through a three-bounce decay

classes.name: sds-btn-press-pop
classes.description: Anticipation dip, pop past full size, settle — the label leads the button by a beat

classes.name: sds-btn-press-seesaw
classes.description: Alternating corner tilts decay to rest, like a key that hasn't seated yet

classes.name: sds-btn-press-spring
classes.description: Drops 3px with a squash, then rebounds through a two-step spring — the press you can feel

classes.name: sds-btn-prism-edge
classes.description: A spectral border cycles hue while sweeping emphasis around the frame

classes.name: sds-btn-pulse-border
classes.description: Pulse Border — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-quantum
classes.description: Scale-in with elastic overshoot

classes.name: sds-btn-radar
classes.description: Radar — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-recoil
classes.description: Recoil — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-ripple
classes.description: Ripple — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-rotate
classes.description: Rotate — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-scan
classes.description: Scan — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-sheen-double
classes.description: Two sheens cross from opposite ends, flaring where they meet mid-button

classes.name: sds-btn-sheen-pass
classes.description: A glossy bar sweeps across at a skew with a brightness kiss at center

classes.name: sds-btn-shimmer
classes.description: Shimmer — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-shock
classes.description: Outline rings expand outward in a pulse

classes.name: sds-btn-shutter-snap
classes.description: A diamond iris pinches almost closed, holds, then snaps open with overshoot

classes.name: sds-btn-slice-hover
classes.description: Top and bottom halves shear apart for two frames like a shutter glitch, then realign

classes.name: sds-btn-slice-reveal
classes.description: Assembles as top and bottom edges arrive out of phase, sealing with a brightness flash

classes.name: sds-btn-spark-orbit
classes.description: A glowing spark rides the button's outline in a full lap, dimming on the far side

classes.name: sds-btn-split
classes.description: Split — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-spotlight-pan
classes.description: A soft radial spotlight pans corner to corner; the label brightens as it passes

classes.name: sds-btn-stretch
classes.description: Stretch — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-surge-charge
classes.description: Gathers (dims), surges bright with a halo flare, then calms — a three-act energy cycle

classes.name: sds-btn-swap-flip
classes.description: Icon and label trade a crossing gesture — passing each other with a dip, then re-seating

classes.name: sds-btn-swipe
classes.description: Swipe — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-tick-tock
classes.description: Metronome micro-rotation with an end-of-bar accent scale

classes.name: sds-btn-tilt
classes.description: Tilt — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-tilt-float
classes.description: Levitates with a Y-bob, a 1.2° roll, and a drop-shadow that breathes with the height

classes.name: sds-btn-tilt-orbit
classes.description: The button leans through a slow elliptical orbit on two phase-shifted axes

classes.name: sds-btn-tilt-pendulum
classes.description: Hangs from its top edge and swings with natural decay, re-energizing each cycle

classes.name: sds-btn-tilt-scan
classes.description: Leans corner-to-corner with brief holds, as if scanning for the cursor

classes.name: sds-btn-volt
classes.description: High-voltage border pulse

classes.name: sds-btn-warp
classes.description: Warp — button animation.

classes.name: sds-btn-wink
classes.description: A corner highlight blinks twice every few seconds, then keeps a straight face

classes.name: sds-card-accordion-in
classes.description: Children unfold sequentially from scaleY(0) at the top — like opening accordion panels.

classes.name: sds-card-aurora
classes.description: Aurora — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-bloom
classes.description: Bloom — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-border-beam
classes.description: Single light bead orbits the card border continuously via CSS Motion Path (offset-path: border-box).

classes.name: sds-card-border-tide
classes.description: Twin light beads 180° apart chase each other around the border — tidal wave pattern.

classes.name: sds-card-bounce-in
classes.description: Entrance from below with spring overshoot — 5-stage oscillation settles at rest.

classes.name: sds-card-breath
classes.description: Breath — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-burst
classes.description: Burst — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-carousel-step
classes.description: Cycles through four yaw poses (0°, −30°, −60°, −90°) with held pauses — mimics a rotating carousel.

classes.name: sds-card-cascade
classes.description: Cascade — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-checker
classes.description: Four quadrant children scale in as two alternating diagonal pairs. Requires 4 child elements.

classes.name: sds-card-cinematic
classes.description: Wipes open from center via clip-path

classes.name: sds-card-content-flood
classes.description: Diagonal clip-path floods from the top-left corner, filling the card in two sweeping phases.

classes.name: sds-card-corner-charge
classes.description: Diagonal corner pairs (top-right + bottom-left) flash in alternating rhythm — energy charge effect.

classes.name: sds-card-crystal-pulse
classes.description: Brightness + contrast + scale pulse — card catches light like a crystal facet.

classes.name: sds-card-curtain-fall
classes.description: A dark curtain drops from above, holds, then retracts to reveal the card — theatre-stage entrance.

classes.name: sds-card-deal-arc
classes.description: Entrance: card arcs in from upper-left with −18° rotation — classic card-deal motion.

classes.name: sds-card-deck-cycle
classes.description: Perspective yaw cycle — card tips 22° and returns, mimicking thumbing through a deck.

classes.name: sds-card-deck-peek
classes.description: Two ghost cards peek from behind the main card with staggered offset-rotate on a loop.

classes.name: sds-card-deep-float
classes.description: Deep Float — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-depth
classes.description: Depth — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-diagonal-wipe
classes.description: Polygon clip sweeps diagonally from left; a 2 px brightness seam rides the clip edge at reveal.

classes.name: sds-card-dive
classes.description: Entrance from overhead: rotateX 65° + upward translate, blur clears on two-stage deceleration brake.

classes.name: sds-card-door-peek
classes.description: Card pivots open −18° on its left hinge, holds, then swings shut — like a door ajar.

classes.name: sds-card-drift
classes.description: Drift — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-edge-scan
classes.description: Gloss scan line sweeps across top then bottom edge in sequence — scanner/lidar aesthetic.

classes.name: sds-card-elastic-drop
classes.description: Drops from 55 px above with 3-cycle scaleY oscillation — bungee-cord physics.

classes.name: sds-card-electric
classes.description: Electric — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-expand
classes.description: Expand — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-fan-spread
classes.description: Children rotate out from their shared bottom-left corner with stagger — playing-card fan open.

classes.name: sds-card-flip
classes.description: Flip — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-flip-loop
classes.description: Full 360° Y-axis rotation; brightness dips to 35% at the 90° and 270° edges, elastic overshoot on landing.

classes.name: sds-card-flip-reveal
classes.description: Flip Reveal — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-float
classes.description: Gentle floating with shadow growth

classes.name: sds-card-float-gimbal
classes.description: Gentle levitation loop with micro counter-rotations on both axes — stabiliser-gimbal quality.

classes.name: sds-card-fold
classes.description: Fold — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-force
classes.description: Force — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-frame-breathe
classes.description: The card's border ring pulses opacity and blur in a slow 2.4 s breath cycle.

classes.name: sds-card-frame-draw
classes.description: The card's border ring is drawn in left to right via clip-path — drawn-on feel.

classes.name: sds-card-free-fall
classes.description: Gravity-curve fall from 64 px above; blur clears on a two-stage deceleration.

classes.name: sds-card-glass
classes.description: Glass — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-glass-frost
classes.description: Blur + brightness frost cycle — card appears to ice over and clear on a 3.5 s loop.

classes.name: sds-card-glass-wipe
classes.description: Frosted-glass strip (blurred translucent slab) sweeps across the card with a skew.

classes.name: sds-card-glitch
classes.description: Glitch — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-glow
classes.description: Breathing outer glow on a card

classes.name: sds-card-gravity
classes.description: Gravity — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-holo
classes.description: Rotates on X/Y with hue shift effect

classes.name: sds-card-hue-shift
classes.description: Full 360° hue-rotate sweep — prismatic rainbow wash cycling through the card.

classes.name: sds-card-idle-bob
classes.description: Gentle 8 px vertical float — calm levitation ambient.

classes.name: sds-card-idle-breathe
classes.description: Micro scale pulse 1 → 1.018 — barely perceptible ambient breath.

classes.name: sds-card-idle-glow
classes.description: drop-shadow glow breathes in and out on a 2.8 s loop.

classes.name: sds-card-idle-pulse
classes.description: Scale + opacity pulse — subtle attention-seeking ambient loop.

classes.name: sds-card-idle-rock
classes.description: ±2° rotation rock — gentle pendulum ambient on a 3.5 s loop.

classes.name: sds-card-idle-sway
classes.description: Slow ±6 px lateral sway on a 4 s ease-in-out loop.

classes.name: sds-card-ink
classes.description: Ink — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-iris
classes.description: Iris — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-iris-bloom
classes.description: Iris opens from an off-centre point with a brightness flare at full aperture, then settles.

classes.name: sds-card-layers
classes.description: Children bob at staggered amplitudes (5 px → 13 px) for a parallax depth illusion. Requires child elements.

classes.name: sds-card-lens-bulge
classes.description: Subtle scale + perspective pulse that mimics a magnifying lens swelling and receding.

classes.name: sds-card-letterbox
classes.description: Cinematic black bars part vertically while card content scales 1.04 → 1.

classes.name: sds-card-levitate
classes.description: Levitate — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-liquid-border
classes.description: Liquid Border — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-magnetic
classes.description: Lifts and rotates slightly in a float

classes.name: sds-card-momentum
classes.description: Momentum — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-morph
classes.description: Morph — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-neon
classes.description: Neon — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-neon-border
classes.description: Neon Border — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-parallax
classes.description: Perspective rotateX with Z push

classes.name: sds-card-pinball
classes.description: Enters with 4 direction changes and rotation damping — pinball ricochet physics.

classes.name: sds-card-portal
classes.description: Flies in from deep Z perspective

classes.name: sds-card-prism
classes.description: Prism — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-refract-slide
classes.description: Diagonal caustic-light beam (blurred 135° gradient) slides across the card surface.

classes.name: sds-card-reveal-stack
classes.description: Children slide up from beneath with 100 ms stagger — like cards fanning out of a deck.

classes.name: sds-card-rise
classes.description: Rise — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-rotate
classes.description: Rotate — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-rubber-band
classes.description: scaleX/scaleY squeeze-stretch alternation — rubber-band snap entrance.

classes.name: sds-card-scan
classes.description: Scan — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-shadow-lift
classes.description: Shadow Lift — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-shimmer
classes.description: Diagonal shimmer background cycles

classes.name: sds-card-shuffle-deal
classes.description: Entrance: card is dealt from upper-left with a diagonal translate and −14° rotation.

classes.name: sds-card-shutter
classes.description: Five stepped horizontal reveals — mechanical shutter feel via steps(5) clip-path inset.

classes.name: sds-card-slice
classes.description: Children slice up in sequence

classes.name: sds-card-slingshot
classes.description: Launched from lower-left on a diagonal arc with deceleration overshoot and settle.

classes.name: sds-card-smoke
classes.description: Smoke — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-snap
classes.description: Snap — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-snap-back
classes.description: Overshoots right, snaps back left with rotation settle — stretched-elastic return.

classes.name: sds-card-spiral-reveal
classes.description: Radar wedge sweeps 360° clockwise from 12 o'clock, revealing the card as it goes.

classes.name: sds-card-spotlight
classes.description: Spotlight — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-spring
classes.description: Spring — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-stack-drop
classes.description: Entrance: card drops from 38 px above with a two-stage deceleration brake.

classes.name: sds-card-stack-pop
classes.description: Card lifts from its stack with rising translateY and a growing drop-shadow on a 2.2 s loop.

classes.name: sds-card-stagger
classes.description: Stagger — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-tear
classes.description: Jagged clip-path rips diagonally from the top-left corner with a paper-curl rotate.

classes.name: sds-card-tilt
classes.description: Tilt — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-tilt-orbit
classes.description: Slow elliptical perspective lean — phase-shifted rotateX/rotateY on a 6 s loop, drop-shadow traces the tilt.

classes.name: sds-card-unfold
classes.description: Unfold — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-unpack
classes.description: Card spring-expands from a compressed scaleY(0.25) / rotateX state — box-opening effect.

classes.name: sds-card-vortex
classes.description: Vortex — card animation.

classes.name: sds-card-warp
classes.description: Rotates in from -90° on the Y axis

classes.name: sds-card-wave
classes.description: Wave — card animation.

classes.name: sds-center-burst
classes.description: Chars start at center, fan out

classes.name: sds-char-orbit
classes.description: Orbits in from above with rotation

classes.name: sds-chromatic-shift
classes.description: Slow hue-rotate + saturate colour cycle

classes.name: sds-cinema-title
classes.description: Letter-spacing collapses with blur in cinematic style

classes.name: sds-cipher-reveal
classes.description: Brightness and blur resolve like decryption

classes.name: sds-color-cycle
classes.description: Cycles through a flowing gradient (loop)

classes.name: sds-data-stream
classes.description: Clip-path + brightness data-decode entrance

classes.description: Delay 1 — playback modifier.

classes.description: Deep warp from Z-space with delay

classes.description: Flies in from deep Z-space

classes.description: Swings open like a door in 3D

classes.name: sds-drop-bounce
classes.description: Drops and bounces on the floor

classes.name: sds-drop-settle
classes.description: Per-char staggered fall from above

classes.name: sds-echo-out
classes.description: Casts a layered echo shadow

classes.description: Spring overshoot with cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1)

classes.description: Scattered start, spring to position

classes.description: Fast — playback modifier.

classes.description: Fill Both — playback modifier.

classes.description: Fill Forward — playback modifier.

classes.description: Sepia-tinted focus-pull entrance

classes.description: Light-bulb turn-on with stepped opacity flicker

classes.description: Flips in on the X axis

classes.description: Flips in on the Y axis

classes.description: Gently floats and bobs (loop)

classes.description: Camera-focus pull from soft to sharp

classes.description: Folds down into view on a 3D hinge

classes.description: Folds up into view on a 3D hinge

classes.description: Flickering analog noise with slicing displacement

classes.description: Glitch-steps into place

classes.description: Pulses with a soft neon glow (loop)

classes.name: sds-gradient-sweep
classes.description: Moving gradient mask over the text

classes.name: sds-grand-entrance
classes.description: Big orchestrated scale-blur entrance

classes.name: sds-gravity-bounce
classes.description: Falls under gravity, inelastic floor bounce

classes.name: sds-gravity-drop
classes.description: Falls from above with overshoot bounce

classes.name: sds-heartbeat-text
classes.description: Beats like a heartbeat (loop)

classes.name: sds-heat-shimmer
classes.description: Subtle heat-distortion skewX + scaleY loop

classes.name: sds-highlight-burn
classes.description: Highlight marker swipes across the text

classes.name: sds-hologram-text
classes.description: Holographic skew flicker with hue rotation

classes.name: sds-in
classes.description: In — infrastructure animation.

classes.name: sds-ink-bleed
classes.description: Letter-spacing collapses as blur resolves

classes.name: sds-input-active-line
classes.description: Active Line — input animation.

classes.name: sds-input-arrive-drop
classes.description: Drops in from above and lands with a squash while its shadow snaps up to meet it

classes.name: sds-input-arrive-materialize
classes.description: Assembles in stepped slices out of blur and brightness, left to right

classes.name: sds-input-arrive-pendulum
classes.description: Swings in from a top hinge through two decaying swings, then levels out

classes.name: sds-input-arrive-slide-label
classes.description: The field slides in from the left as its label drops from above, meeting with a synced bounce

classes.name: sds-input-arrive-spotlight

classes.description: Crystallises from a bright blur

classes.description: Prism Reveal — scroll animation.

classes.description: Punch — scroll animation.

classes.description: Circle expands from the bottom center

classes.description: Explodes in from large scale

classes.description: Skew — scroll animation.

classes.description: Slides in from the left with overshoot

classes.description: Slide Right — scroll animation.

classes.description: Compressed from the left then launched forward with elastic overshoot.

classes.description: Snap — scroll animation.

classes.description: Spiral — scroll animation.

classes.description: Split Reveal — scroll animation.

classes.description: Spring — scroll animation.

classes.description: Streak — scroll animation.

classes.description: Vortex — scroll animation.

classes.description: Perspective-warp entrance from below
